name: Oriental Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into thin strips.
2. In a medium bowl, combine sugar and cornstarch.
3. Gradually stir in vinegar and soy sauce.
4. Stir in pineapple, green pepper, and onion; set aside.
5. Heat oil in a wok.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry until tender and white.
7. Add the pineapple and vegetable mixture; stir until well combined.
8. Cover and simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
Cal: 314; Fat 7g.
